message:
Merge PR #2719: fix: filter MQ list by rig to prevent cross-rig wisp contamination

Filters MR list by rig name since wisps are shared across all rigs in
the Dolt server. Without this, MQ list shows entries from other rigs.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2719
Author: Cdfghglz
